raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblywoman Pilar Schiavo's office has secured nearly $95 million in direct investments for Assembly District 40.",
    "The funding will address critical needs across the district, including affordable housing, school safety improvements, fire and water infrastructure, and community health initiatives.",
    "The investments will enhance security and modernization efforts in educational facilities.",
    "The funding will bolster infrastructure to safeguard communities against natural disasters.",
    "Community health and wellness initiatives will support healthcare and wellness programs for vulnerable residents.",
    "The investments will create healthier and more sustainable environments for students in K-12 public schools.",
    "Programs will be invested in to protect and empower families throughout the district.",
    "Supportive programs will be provided to ensure seniors have the resources they need to live well and thrive.",
    "$1.3 million has been returned directly to district residents through the resolution of issues with state agencies."
  ]
}
```
